Video.summary: Savor an array of delectable pastries that cater to your sweet cravings.
Video.title: FoodieBoy : Pastry in Korea

Video.summary: Satisfy your sweet tooth with a diverse assortment of delectable cakes.
Video.title: FoodieBoy : Cake Collection

Video.summary: Feast on cheese-filled fried meat, assorted Korean fries, and fried squid for crispy, flavorful snacks.
Video.title: Food Kingdom: Assorted Korean Fried Snacks

Image.alt: Food Kingdom: Assorted Korean Fried Snacks
Food Kingdom: Assorted Korean Fried Snacks
Food Kingdom: Assorted Korean Fried Snacks

Video.summary: Explore Korean agriculture with Mushroom, Cherry Tomato, Vegetable, Dairy Cow, and Egg Farms.
Video.title: Food Kingdom : Korean Farm

Video.summary: Indulge in Korean home meals, Pork Barbeque, and various side dishes for Korean Traditional Weddings.
Video.title: Food Kingdom : Korean Traditional Side Dishes

Image.alt: Food Kingdom : Korean Traditional Side Dishes
Food Kingdom : Korean Traditional Side Dishes
Food Kingdom : Korean Traditional Side Dishes

Video.summary: Experience an array of special grill courses with Tepanyaki cooking each a sizzling delight.
Video.title: FoodieBoy : Special Grill Course (Tepanyaki)

Video.summary: Enjoy homemade chocolate, cheese almond chocolates, and colorful smile candies for a sweet Korean candy treat.
Video.title: Food Kingdom: Homemade Korean Candies

Video.summary: Treat yourself to an indulgent sushi feast with a wide variety of options that cater to your sushi cravings.
Video.title: FoodieBoy : Sushi in Korea

Video.summary: Treat yourself to mozzarella cheese hot dogs, giant donuts, and a variety of cheesy hot dogs.
Video.title: Food Kingdom: Korean Hot Dog Feast

Image.alt: Food Kingdom: Korean Hot Dog Feast
Food Kingdom: Korean Hot Dog Feast
Food Kingdom: Korean Hot Dog Feast

Video.summary: Dive into cheesy hot dogs, mozzarella cheese toast, bulgogi cheese toast, and more savory bites.
Video.title: Food Kingdom: Cheese Lover’s Feast

Video.summary: Elevate your burger experience with an impressive selection of handcrafted options.
Video.title: FoodieBoy : Amazing Handmade Burger

Video.summary: Delight in fish-shaped bread, souffle pancakes, and peanut cream bread for a sweet treat.
Video.title: Food Kingdom: Korean Sweet Breads

Video.summary: Delight in grilled seafood, squid green onion jeon, and seafood kalguksu for a seafood feast.
Video.title: Food Kingdom: Seafood Grill and Korean Jeon

Image.alt: Food Kingdom: Seafood Grill and Korean Jeon
Food Kingdom: Seafood Grill and Korean Jeon
Food Kingdom: Seafood Grill and Korean Jeon

Video.summary: Explore the delights of Japanese cuisine available in Korea from sushi to savory udon.
Video.title: FoodieBoy : Japanese Dishes in Korea

Video.summary: Delight in a satisfying and hearty meal featuring an assortment of casual and grilled dishes.
Video.title: FoodieBoy : Meat Cuisine

Video.summary: Savor omelet burgers, egg roll sandwiches, and healthy egg kimbap in this egg-inspired Korean food episode.
Video.title: Food Kingdom: Egg Sandwich and Omelet Creations

Image.alt: Food Kingdom: Egg Sandwich and Omelet Creations
Food Kingdom: Egg Sandwich and Omelet Creations
Food Kingdom: Egg Sandwich and Omelet Creations

Video.summary: Experience the artistry in your cup with lattes featuring intricate and delightful cream designs.
Video.title: FoodieBoy : Special Latte with Cream Art

FoodieBoy : Special Latte with Cream Art
FoodieBoy : Special Latte with Cream Art

Video.summary: Indulge in a world of pizza delights from classic choices to unique creations.
Video.title: FoodieBoy : Amazing Special Pizza

Video.summary: Explore the art of beverage crafting with Soju, Ginseng extract, and Portion Drink
Video.title: Food Kingdom : Korean Drink Factory

Video.summary: Relish the flavors of the West in Korea from pasta to tapas in a dining experience like no other.
Video.title: FoodieBoy : Western Food in Korea

Video.summary: Experience the flavors of Galbitang, Horse Meat Bulgogi, Spicy Braised Beef Feet, and Spicy Kalguksu.
Video.title: Food Kingdom : Korean Dishes Factory

Video.summary: Enjoy shrimp dumplings, giant drum-baked dumplings, and Korean street bread for a savory and satisfying combo.
Video.title: Food Kingdom: Dumplings and Korean Street Breads

Food Kingdom: Dumplings and Korean Street Breads
Food Kingdom: Dumplings and Korean Street Breads

Video.summary: Treat yourself to Korean fried chicken, from spicy fried chicken to crispy cauldron-fried gizzard.
Video.title: Food Kingdom: Crispy Fried Chicken Feast

Food Kingdom: Crispy Fried Chicken Feast
Food Kingdom: Crispy Fried Chicken Feast

Video.summary: Taste flower crepes, frozen Dubai tarts, and crispy rice chocolate for a colorful fusion dessert experience.
Video.title: Food Kingdom: Fusion Desserts

Video.summary: Indulge in soft Taiwanese castella, meringue cakes, and Oreo strawberry rice cakes.
Video.title: Food Kingdom: Castella and Meringue Delights

Video.summary: Beat the summer heat with a diverse range of chilled delights from ice cream to refreshing cold brews.
Video.title: FoodieBoy : Cold Desserts in Korea
